command: rg -i "Business & eCommerce|Premium Plan|unable to book|enable bookings|upgrade.*bookings|plan limitations" corpus/wixqa -n
observation: Keyword search found Bookings setup, premium-plan, and generic upgrade articles.
why_it_mattered: Several results contained the same words as the question, but not all addressed the plan-limit blocker.

command: rg -i "accept bookings|unable.*book|can't book|cannot book|book a tour|plan limitations|current plan" corpus/wixqa/articles -n
observation: The agent kept searching for exact failure-language matches.
why_it_mattered: The exact phrases were sparse, so the run drifted back toward broader Bookings setup documents.

observation: The setup article mentioned adding Wix Bookings and accepting bookings after upgrading.
why_it_mattered: That made the article look plausible, but its main purpose was setup rather than resolving current plan limitations.

observation: The baseline selected the Bookings setup article.
why_it_mattered: It missed the expected upgrade article after 7 commands and 38,293 token usage.
